title: Light Malt Croatian Papelon Bowl
description: A malty, light, and flavorful Croatian-inspired bowl featuring papelon, simmered in a nimono broth, perfect as a solo dinner option.

ingredients.name: Papelon
ingredients.notes: Dried papelon available at most Eastern European markets.

ingredients.name: Nimono broth mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores.

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add papelon and stir to combine.
Pour in nimono broth mix, dried thyme, black pepper, and salt. Bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 15 minutes, or until papelon is tender.
Stir in chopped parsley and malt vinegar.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
